summary: Frontend-only testing of MyMessagesPage unified messaging system. All features verified: category tabs (Все, P2P Сделки, Маркетплейс, Поддержка, Форум), 'Написать в поддержку' button, category filtering, chat display with role colors, 'Удаление запрещено' message for disputes, message input field, and role legend.
critical_code_review_comments: Role colors correctly implemented per spec: User/Buyer=White, P2P Seller=White+💱, Shop Owner=Purple #8B5CF6, Merchant=Orange #F97316, P2P Moderator=Yellow #F59E0B, Marketplace Moderator/Guarantor=Yellow+⚖️, Support=Blue #3B82F6, Admin=Red #EF4444, System=Gray #6B7280
context_for_next_testing_agent: MyMessagesPage at /trader/messages fully tested. All category tabs work, support ticket modal works, chat display with role colors verified, 'Удаление запрещено' shown for dispute chats, role legend at bottom of chat area.

1_login_as_trader.details: Login with trader/000000 at /auth page successful

2_navigate_to_messages.details: Navigation to /trader/messages works, page loads correctly

4_support_button_visible.details: 'Написать в поддержку' button visible with data-testid='new-support-ticket-btn'

5_p2p_category_filter.details: Clicking P2P category tab highlights it and filters conversations

6_conversation_click_opens_chat.details: Clicking conversation opens chat panel with messages, participants, and input field

colors_verified.user_buyer: White with border (bg-white text-black border border-gray-300)

8_delete_locked_message.details: 'Удаление запрещено' message shown for dispute chats with delete_locked=true

9_message_input_present.details: Message input field with data-testid='message-input' and send button with data-testid='send-message-btn' present

10_role_legend_shown.details: Role legend at bottom of chat area shows all role types with correct color indicators

11_support_ticket_modal.details: Modal opens with category dropdown, subject input, message textarea, and submit button
